assumptions.name: Multiples used
assumptions.rationale: EV/Revenue applied whenever target revenue and >=1 peer revenue are present; EV/EBITDA additionally applied when target EBITDA and >=2 peers' EBITDA are positive.

assumptions.name: EV/Revenue median multiple
assumptions.rationale: Median across sector peers; 25/75 percentile drives low/high.

assumptions.name: EV/EBITDA median multiple
assumptions.rationale: Median across sector peers with positive EBITDA.

assumptions.name: Peer count
assumptions.rationale: Number of sector-matched peers found in the comps universe; drives confidence via min(1, n/8).

citations.description: Peer set: CRM, DDOG, NOW, WDAY (sector=SaaS, n=4)

assumptions.name: Reference index
assumptions.rationale: Used as a public-market proxy for the period return between last round and as-of date.

assumptions.name: Range factor
assumptions.rationale: Basis-risk haircut/expansion to reflect that the chosen index is an imperfect proxy for the company's specific industry beta.

assumptions.name: Index lookup strategy
assumptions.rationale: Returns the closing level of the most recent entry on or before the requested date. Defensible heuristic in the absence of daily granularity; emit as a known approximation rather than interpolating.

assumptions.name: Age decay
assumptions.rationale: Last-round signal degrades as the round becomes stale; zero confidence at 2 years.

assumptions.name: Terminal growth rate
assumptions.rationale: Long-run nominal growth; must be < discount rate (Gordon stability).

assumptions.name: FCF formula
assumptions.rationale: No D&A tax shield modeled — slightly conservative.

assumptions.name: Sensitivity grid
assumptions.rationale: Range = min/max across 9 valid cells; point = midpoint. 0 cell(s) skipped (Gordon stability: g >= r).

assumptions.name: Confidence formula
assumptions.rationale: Saturates at 5 projection years; completeness counts non-zero revenue/ebitda/capex across years (ΔNWC excluded — default is 0).

citations.description: DCF on 5 projection years; discount=0.12, terminal_growth=0.03, tax=0.21

method_results.notes: 3x3 sensitivity grid (discount_rate +/- 1pp x terminal_growth +/- 0.5pp) over 5 projection years; range = min/max across 9 valid cells, point = midpoint.
